creator: robert@openbsd.org
text:
Created attachment 232588
0001-unbreak-setting-the-download-directory.freebsd-canno.patch

Hi Oleh,

This was because some sandboxing code slipped in to the freebsd code as well.
I've uploaded a package that you can test directly, this should fix the issue:

https://nerd.hu/tmp/chromium-99.0.4844.74_1.pkg

The patch itself is also attached.
